facilities.name: Orange County Landfill
facilities.hours: Orange County posts current landfill hours on its landfill and transfer station page. Confirm before visiting.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load type, weight, and residency. Check the county rate schedule before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the county page to confirm accepted materials, payment methods, and public self-haul rules before driving.
